contents:
(** Quoting the Homotopy Type Theory Book (with slight changes for
    notational consistency): *)

(** Theorem (Structure identity principle): If [X] is a category and
    [(P, H)] is a standard notion of structure over [X], then the
    precategory [Str_{(P, H)}(X)] is a category. *)

Definition sip_isotoid_helper (xa yb : StrX)
             (f : xa <~=~> yb)
  : xa.1 <~=~> yb.1.

Lemma sip_isotoid_helper_refl (xa : StrX)
  : @sip_isotoid_helper xa xa (reflexivity _) = reflexivity _.

Lemma sip_helper x y (p : x = y) (a : P x) (b : P y)
  : transport P p a = b
    <-> is_structure_homomorphism P _ _ (idtoiso X p) a b *
        is_structure_homomorphism P _ _ (idtoiso X p)^-1 b a.

goals.conclusion:
transport P p a = b <->
is_structure_homomorphism P x y (idtoiso X p) a b *
is_structure_homomorphism P y x (idtoiso X p)^-1 b a

transport P p a = b <->
is_structure_homomorphism P x y (idtoiso X p) a b *
is_structure_homomorphism P y x (idtoiso X p)^-1 b a

transport P p a = b ->
is_structure_homomorphism P x y (idtoiso X p) a b *
is_structure_homomorphism P y x (idtoiso X p)^-1 b a

is_structure_homomorphism P x y (idtoiso X p) a b *
is_structure_homomorphism P y x (idtoiso X p)^-1 b a -> 
transport P p a = b

transport P p a = b ->
is_structure_homomorphism P x y (idtoiso X p) a b *
is_structure_homomorphism P y x (idtoiso X p)^-1 b a

is_structure_homomorphism P x y (idtoiso X p) a b *
is_structure_homomorphism P y x (idtoiso X p)^-1 b a -> 
transport P p a = b

contents:
Definition sip_isotoid (xa yb : StrX)
             (f : xa <~=~> yb)
  : xa = yb.

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun x : X => P x) (isotoid X xa.1 yb.1 (sip_isotoid_helper f))
  xa.2 =
yb.2

is_structure_homomorphism P xa.1 yb.1
  (idtoiso X (isotoid X xa.1 yb.1 (sip_isotoid_helper f))) xa.2 yb.2 *
is_structure_homomorphism P yb.1 xa.1
  (idtoiso X (isotoid X xa.1 yb.1 (sip_isotoid_helper f)))^-1 yb.2 xa.2

contents:
Lemma sip_isotoid_refl xa
  : @sip_isotoid xa xa (reflexivity _) = reflexivity _.

goals.conclusion:
sip_isotoid (reflexivity xa) =
path_sigma_uncurried (fun x : X => P x) xa xa
  ((reflexivity xa) ..1; (reflexivity xa) ..2)

(isotoid X xa.1 xa.1 (sip_isotoid_helper (reflexivity xa));
let X0 :=
  fun (x y : X) (p : x = y) (a : P x) (b : P y) => snd (sip_helper p a b) in
X0 xa.1 xa.1 (isotoid X xa.1 xa.1 (sip_isotoid_helper (reflexivity xa))) xa.2
  xa.2
  (let H' :=
     eisretr (idtoiso X (y:=xa.1)) (sip_isotoid_helper (reflexivity xa)) in
   transport
     (fun i : xa.1 <~=~> xa.1 =>
      is_structure_homomorphism P xa.1 xa.1 i xa.2 xa.2)
     H'^ (PreCategoryOfStructures.h (reflexivity xa)),
  let H' :=
    eisretr (idtoiso X (y:=xa.1)) (sip_isotoid_helper (reflexivity xa)) in
  transport
    (fun i : xa.1 <~=~> xa.1 =>
     is_structure_homomorphism P xa.1 xa.1 i^-1 xa.2 xa.2)
    H'^ (PreCategoryOfStructures.h (reflexivity xa)^-1))) =
((reflexivity xa) ..1; (reflexivity xa) ..2)

(isotoid X xa.1 xa.1 (sip_isotoid_helper (reflexivity xa));
let X0 :=
  fun (x y : X) (p : x = y) (a : P x) (b : P y) => snd (sip_helper p a b) in
X0 xa.1 xa.1 (isotoid X xa.1 xa.1 (sip_isotoid_helper (reflexivity xa))) xa.2
  xa.2
  (let H' :=
     eisretr (idtoiso X (y:=xa.1)) (sip_isotoid_helper (reflexivity xa)) in
   transport
     (fun i : xa.1 <~=~> xa.1 =>
      is_structure_homomorphism P xa.1 xa.1 i xa.2 xa.2)
     H'^ (PreCategoryOfStructures.h (reflexivity xa)),
  let H' :=
    eisretr (idtoiso X (y:=xa.1)) (sip_isotoid_helper (reflexivity xa)) in
  transport
    (fun i : xa.1 <~=~> xa.1 =>
     is_structure_homomorphism P xa.1 xa.1 i^-1 xa.2 xa.2)
    H'^ (PreCategoryOfStructures.h (reflexivity xa)^-1))).1 =
((reflexivity xa) ..1; (reflexivity xa) ..2).1
isotoid X xa.1 xa.1 (sip_isotoid_helper (isomorphic_refl StrX xa)) = 1%path

isotoid X xa.1 xa.1 (sip_isotoid_helper (isomorphic_refl StrX xa)) =
isotoid X xa.1 xa.1 ((isotoid X xa.1 xa.1)^-1%function 1%path)

sip_isotoid_helper (isomorphic_refl StrX xa) =
(isotoid X xa.1 xa.1)^-1%function 1%path

contents:
Lemma path_f_idtoiso_precategory_of_structures xa yb (p : xa = yb)
  : PreCategoryOfStructures.f (idtoiso (precategory_of_structures P) p : morphism _ _ _)
    = idtoiso X p..1.

goals.conclusion:
PreCategoryOfStructures.f
  (idtoiso (precategory_of_structures P) p
   :
   morphism (precategory_of_structures P) xa yb) =
idtoiso X p ..1

PreCategoryOfStructures.f
  (idtoiso (precategory_of_structures P) p
   :
   morphism (precategory_of_structures P) xa yb) =
idtoiso X p ..1

contents:
Lemma structure_identity_principle_helper
        (xa yb : StrX)
        (x : xa <~=~> yb)
  : PreCategoryOfStructures.f
      (idtoiso (precategory_of_structures P) (sip_isotoid x) : morphism _ _ _)
    = PreCategoryOfStructures.f (x : morphism _ _ _).

goals.conclusion:
PreCategoryOfStructures.f
  (idtoiso (precategory_of_structures P) (sip_isotoid x)
   :
   morphism (precategory_of_structures P) xa yb) =
PreCategoryOfStructures.f (x : morphism StrX xa yb)

PreCategoryOfStructures.f
  (idtoiso (precategory_of_structures P) (sip_isotoid x)
   :
   morphism (precategory_of_structures P) xa yb) =
PreCategoryOfStructures.f (x : morphism StrX xa yb)
(sip_isotoid x) ..1 = isotoid X xa.1 yb.1 (sip_isotoid_helper x)

contents:
refine (isequiv_adjointify
              _ (@sip_isotoid xa yb)
              _ _);
      intro; simpl in *.
